message:
refactor: Add h.codecResult() helper, convert more modules to shared helpers

- Add codecResult() to mod_helper.zig for codec tuple patterns
- Convert 14 modules to use shared helpers:
  - _codecs_mod, _csv_mod, _elementtree_mod, _hashlib_mod
  - _pickle_mod, ipaddress_mod, logging_mod, types_mod
  - uuid_mod, warnings_mod, weakref_mod, xmlrpc_mod, zoneinfo_mod
- Net reduction: 122 lines
- Total *_mod.zig lines: 6649 (down from 7393, -10% total)
